title: Pocket Repro Shell
concept: A mobile-first Playground redesign for support engineers that turns the app into a compact reproduction kit: the active site, save status, next launch actions, saved Playgrounds, Site Manager tools, gallery, imports, and exports are all reachable from a persistent bottom dock without modal overlays.
flows: Start a Playground from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, .zip import, featured blueprints, or the full Blueprint gallery.
Save an unsaved Playground to browser storage or a local directory with visible progress, then manage saved and unsaved entries with rename and delete actions.
Navigate the active WordPress site by path, refresh it, and jump to Homepage or WP Admin from the compact shell.
Use stacked Site Manager panels for settings, files, blueprint JSON, database tools, logs, export to GitHub, and zip download.
Browse and filter all Blueprint gallery categories from an inline mobile panel.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
edit WordPress version, PHP version, and language settings
understand destructive reset and stored Save and Reload behavior
use File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
inspect Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty states
